creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #11)
> I appreciate the contribution, but if it contains references to pycho then I
> need a new one.  pycho is no longer in ports, so any reference to it is an
> error.

I'm not sure I follow. The revised Makefile explicitly does
not depend, nor use PSYCO related code. So won't affect make(1)
nor install. My point was regarding the [Codeville] src itself.
Not so much where the FreeBSD port is concerned.

Thanks for your response, and time, John.

--Chris
